comprehension_gate.instruction: MANDATORY FIRST ACTION: Before any branch creation, file edits, or commands, read this entire prompt and all required attachments in full. Then present a structured comprehension summary to the Lead Architect covering: (a) milestone objective in your own words (b) work items with 1 sentence each (c) files to READ and files to WRITE (d) ORACLE strategy for this DOCS-ONLY milestone (e) risks or ambiguities (f) EXACT deliverable structure, recited VERBATIM from this prompt: - branch to create: feature/p5-task7-ea2-ao-sr-audit from main at 488b198 - files to WRITE: docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md and docs/POST_OPERATIONAL_MATURATION_LEDGER.md only - docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md must retain exactly these 6 top-level sections in this order: 1. ## Coverage Map 2. ## Stale Test Inventory 3. ## Assertion Quality Findings 4. ## Boundary Violations 5. ## Prioritized Gap Report 6. ## Pre-existing Skip Analysis - append assistant_orchestrator and semantic_router findings to sections 1-4 only - leave sections 5 and 6 exactly: Deferred to EA-5 synthesis. Then STOP and WAIT for explicit Lead Architect approval. Do NOT create the branch, write files, or run commands until the Lead Architect confirms that your recitation is correct.

milestone.title: Task 7 / EA-2: Assistant Orchestrator + Semantic Router Audit
milestone.model_rationale: Constraint-heavy DOCS-ONLY task. L-12 showed that stronger structural compliance controls are needed.
milestone.predecessor: Task 7 / EA-1 merged to main via ff54654. Current main HEAD 488b198 also includes the separate governance merge.
milestone.objective: Audit the assistant_orchestrator and semantic_router test suites against docs/TEST_GOVERNANCE.md and append findings to the merged Task 7 artifact at docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md. EA-2 is limited to services/assistant_orchestrator/src, services/assistant_orchestrator/tests, services/semantic_router/src, and services/semantic_router/tests. It must answer the four Task 7 audit questions for these two services only: coverage gaps, stale or dead tests, assertion quality, and boundary correctness. It must also append ledger Entry 40 to docs/POST_OPERATIONAL_MATURATION_LEDGER.md. No production files or test files may be changed.
milestone.scope:
Read exactly these in-scope source and test files, excluding __init__.py from coverage counts:
assistant_orchestrator production files: - circuit_breaker.py - constants.py - context_manager.py - entrypoint.py - gpu_inference.py - pgov.py
assistant_orchestrator test files: - test_circuit_breaker.py - test_context_manager.py - test_entrypoint.py - test_gpu_inference.py - test_pgov.py
semantic_router production files: - constants.py - intents.py - router.py
semantic_router test files: - test_router.py

work_items.item: Inventory all 9 production files and all 6 test files in scope before drawing conclusions.
Append coverage mapping findings for assistant_orchestrator and semantic_router to docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md.
Append stale or dead test findings for both services.
Append assertion quality findings for both services.
Append boundary correctness findings for both services.
Enforce strict DOC_ONLY hygiene: stage and commit only the two allowed docs files.
Use Tier 3 fail-safe if the full scope cannot be completed without quality degradation.

deliverable.primary_artifact: Modify docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md. Preserve all accepted EA-1 content and append EA-2 findings only.
deliverable.exact_structure:
docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md must continue to contain exactly these 6 top-level sections in this exact order: 1. ## Coverage Map 2. ## Stale Test Inventory 3. ## Assertion Quality Findings 4. ## Boundary Violations 5. ## Prioritized Gap Report 6. ## Pre-existing Skip Analysis
Under sections 1-4, append new clearly labeled subsections for: - ### assistant_orchestrator - ### semantic_router
Content boundaries: - Append assistant_orchestrator and semantic_router findings to sections 1-4 only. - Preserve all accepted EA-1 findings as-is. Do NOT rewrite or re-litigate EA-1 conclusions. - Sections 5 and 6 must remain exactly: Deferred to EA-5 synthesis. - You MAY make a minimal title or preamble adjustment if needed so the document no longer reads as policy_agent-only. - Do NOT add any new top-level sections.
deliverable.coverage_map_contract: Under ## Coverage Map, every in-scope production file must be mapped to its test file(s) with a qualitative coverage assessment and brief rationale. Use a format compatible with the accepted EA-1 document. Do not reformat the entire section merely to normalize taxonomy. The assistant_orchestrator subsection must represent all 6 production files. The semantic_router subsection must represent all 3 production files.
deliverable.stale_inventory_contract: Under ## Stale Test Inventory, record any stale imports, dead code references, renamed module paths, superseded architectural assumptions, or obsolete terminology that no longer matches current production reality. If a service has no stale or dead findings, state that explicitly.
deliverable.assertion_quality_contract: Under ## Assertion Quality Findings, include a short per-service summary paragraph plus a flat list of specific weak-assertion findings with test file and rationale. If a service has no material assertion-quality findings, state that explicitly.
deliverable.boundary_contract: Under ## Boundary Violations, evaluate whether any in-scope tests make real socket connections, perform real filesystem writes beyond isolated scaffolding, depend on live services or hardware, or should really be integration tests rather than service-level unit tests. If a service has no material boundary violations, state that explicitly.
deliverable.ledger_contract:
Append Entry 40 to docs/POST_OPERATIONAL_MATURATION_LEDGER.md using the existing ledger format.
Required content: - Title: Entry 40 - Task 7/EA-2: Assistant Orchestrator + Semantic Router Audit (COMPLETE) - Date: 2026-04-18 or actual execution date - Branch: feature/p5-task7-ea2-ao-sr-audit - Predecessor: Entry 39 - Task 7/EA-1: Policy Agent Test Suite Audit - Type: AUDIT / DOCS-ONLY - Disposition: COMPLETE - Summary: EA-2 completed; assistant_orchestrator and semantic_router findings appended to docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md; sections 5-6 remain deferred to EA-5 - Files: docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md and docs/POST_OPERATIONAL_MATURATION_LEDGER.md only

negative_constraints.item: DO NOT add numbered prefixes to any required ## top-level section headers.
DO NOT add top-level sections beyond the 6 required sections.
DO NOT rename any of the 6 required top-level sections.
DO NOT populate ## Prioritized Gap Report with findings. Leave it exactly: Deferred to EA-5 synthesis.
DO NOT populate ## Pre-existing Skip Analysis with findings. Leave it exactly: Deferred to EA-5 synthesis.
DO NOT rewrite, restructure, or re-litigate accepted EA-1 findings, except for a minimal title or preamble adjustment if needed.
DO NOT modify any file under services/assistant_orchestrator/src/.
DO NOT modify any file under services/assistant_orchestrator/tests/.
DO NOT modify any file under services/semantic_router/src/.
DO NOT modify any file under services/semantic_router/tests/.
DO NOT modify docs/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md for this audit slice.
DO NOT create or modify conftest.py.
DO NOT add, remove, rename, or fix tests.
DO NOT run coverage tooling or install dependencies.
DO NOT touch unrelated pre-existing untracked files in the worktree.

gate.criteria: No Python files may be created or modified in this milestone.

Do not run pytest as a standard gate for this slice. Use file inspection as the primary evidence source. If you run a targeted read-only command to confirm a suspected stale reference, report it explicitly in your session close-out.

gate.command: Manual audit completion against all 9 production files and all 6 test files in scope
gate.criteria: All 6 assistant_orchestrator production files, all 5 assistant_orchestrator test files, all 3 semantic_router production files, and the semantic_router test file are evaluated.

The document still contains the same 6 required top-level sections in the same order. assistant_orchestrator and semantic_router findings are appended under sections 1-4 only. Sections 5 and 6 remain exactly: Deferred to EA-5 synthesis.
If the full scope was not completable without quality degradation, STOP, leave a clearly labeled partial report, record partial status in Entry 40, and recommend a re-scope instead of rushing.

verification.instruction: The Lead Architect will verify this milestone using terminal commands only. Your final EA response must report results that these commands can confirm.

commands.expected: Single EA-2 audit commit on the feature branch
commands.command: Select-String -Path docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md -Pattern "^## ","^### assistant_orchestrator","^### semantic_router","Deferred to EA-5 synthesis"
commands.expected: Shows the 6 required top-level sections, the new assistant_orchestrator and semantic_router subsections, and the unchanged deferred placeholders
Ledger contains Entry 40 for Task 7 / EA-2

commit_template.message:
Task 7 EA-2: Audit assistant_orchestrator and semantic_router test quality
- Appended assistant_orchestrator findings to docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md - Appended semantic_router findings to docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md - Preserved deferred sections for Prioritized Gap Report and Pre-existing Skip Analysis - Recorded ledger Entry 40 in Post-Operational Maturation Ledger
DOC_ONLY gate: diff against 488b198 contains only docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md and docs/POST_OPERATIONAL_MATURATION_LEDGER.md

file.reason: Root pytest configuration and marker policy source
Merged Task 7 artifact to append to
Ledger format and latest audit entry reference

context_notes.note: docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md is now the merged EA-1 artifact from main. It currently reads as policy_agent-focused. A minimal document title or preamble adjustment is permitted if needed, but do not alter the six required ## section headers.

Existing accepted EA-1 content includes numbered ### subsections. Preserve that content as-is. The prohibition on numbered prefixes applies to the required ## top-level section headers and any new ## headers. For new append content, prefer plain service headings: ### assistant_orchestrator and ### semantic_router.

assistant_orchestrator was migrated from NPU naming to GPU naming in Task 5. Any remaining NPU terminology in tests may be a stale-naming finding, but distinguish cosmetic stale terminology from functional dead imports or dead module paths.
docs/TEST_GOVERNANCE.md is the governing standard for this audit. Use its scope definitions, marker policy, boundary rules, and coverage expectations as the rubric.

pyproject.toml defines addopts = "--strict-markers -v --import-mode=importlib -m 'not slow'" and registered markers asyncio and slow. No slow-marker usage is expected in services/assistant_orchestrator/tests or services/semantic_router/tests.
Coverage assessment is qualitative. Do not install or run coverage tooling. Map code to tests by inspection and assess adequacy against happy-path plus error or edge-path expectations.
The two pre-existing skipped tests remain a document-level synthesis concern for EA-5. Do not analyze or disposition them in EA-2.
